stories.title: Djokovic calls Serena's return 'truly inspirationa...
stories.summary: Novak Djokovic told Serena Williams that her sensational comeback to tennis is "truly inspirational" as both prepare for Wimbledon.

stories.title: Uruguay out of WC after GK blunder against Spain
stories.summary: Uruguay pulled goalkeeper Fernando Muslera at halftime of their FIFA World Cup group stage final after his blunder in the first half gifted Spain the lead at Estadio Akron on Friday.

stories.title: Iran coach on VAR call: 'We're an unlucky team'
stories.summary: Iran coach Amir Ghalenoei lamented both the conditions his team have had to face in this tournament, but also the bad luck they encountered.
